note: Refreshed after extending the source-authored VBlank/task-dispatch, bootstrap/display setup, input-stream, controller helper chain, and the downstream selected-input inventory/equipment plus adjacent magic/status menu helpers while preserving ROM order with a bit-perfect rebuild. Current best fit: 0x00501C latches packed (duration,value) bytes from 0xFF1400 into 0x8A4E/0x8A4F, 0x005036 run-length encodes the same format, 0x00505C replays it through the selected-input mirror at 0x8A7A-0x8A7D, 0x007924-0x007D9B now source-authors the adjacent magic/status submode plus six-spell grid, 0x007D9C-0x008059 bridges that flow back into the generic inventory/equipment list UI, 0x00805A-0x0088C1 covers repeat-gated input and adjacent inventory/magic status drawing, 0x008C34-0x008C7F now initializes the visible-list state from local selection scratch, bank 0x020000 now source-authors an upstream quiz/trivia text block at 0x021360-0x02171F plus the inventory/equipment/magic/item name tables, world-keyword table, adjacent shop/inn/Ocarina/dictionary text through 0x02245F, and the first post-dictionary descriptor/index island at 0x022460-0x022DB7, the 0x020000+ top-level whole-bank blobs now route through bank-specific include owners, bank 0x040000 now also isolates the earlier same-bank $01-tagged 0x045842 target as its own 38-tile planar graphics block ahead of the later 0x04BFAA, 0x05C5DA, 0x05D630, and 0x06B192 tile families, 0x0409FA-0x040FFF is split out as an explicit late-bank 0xFF fill slice, the 0x098000-0x09F776 tail-bank non-fill island is now decomposed into a Z80-like code body at 0x098000-0x09907A, two odd-aligned little-endian word lookup tables at 0x09907B-0x09913C and 0x09913D-0x0991FE plus a trailing zero byte at 0x0991FF, and a newly source-authored pre-descriptor structural tail at 0x099200-0x09991F (two monotone byte bands, a fixed 19-byte record family, mixed/control tails, local-offset words, packed bytes, repeated 0x01F1 words, and a short word trailer), the front 0x099BD3-0x09A347 command pocket is now slightly cleaner too because five longer table-targeted records at 0x099D05, 0x099D48, 0x09A10E, 0x09A16A, and 0x09A288 are explicit as smaller FF-terminated subrecords before 0x09A348, descriptor/layout records, zero fill, a command lead-in, a bank-local command offset table at 0x099B32-0x099BAF, an unreferenced command-record prelude at 0x099BB0-0x099BD2, narrower table-targeted command records through 0x09A347, and fully sliced FF-terminated command-record windows at 0x09A348-0x09C007, 0x09C008-0x09E027, and 0x09E028-0x09F776 with only the short non-terminated lead-out at 0x09F76A-0x09F776 still grouped, while the next 0x0A0000-0x0A4C76 island now begins with a source-authored multi-level offset-table tree through 0x0A07C5, continues with repeated four-tuple records through 0x0A0B25, four FF-terminated six-byte bands through 0x0A10AA, a fully record-sliced FF-terminated five-byte tuple family through 0x0A34FF, and a table-targeted back half that now also exposes explicit 3-word bands, local-offset triplet records, and a self-referencing local-offset list. More of the 0x09C008-0x09F776 command windows are now source-authored too: the former raw bridges at 0x09DE58-0x09DFB3 and 0x09E6E2-0x09E9E6 now stand explicitly as compact local-target setup, repeated 0x9x/0xAx high-byte ladder, low-byte ladder, and short F4 1B literal-descent records. The front of the 0x09E028 tail command window is now a little less opaque too: 0x09E028-0x09E22A is source-authored as one compact local-control-to-high-byte ladder bridge, a neighboring literal-control family, and a denser local-control-plus-literal-pair return before the later explicit tail pockets.
